one_time_description: Construction in progress contribution revenue recognized for capital projects managed by Shawano Consulting Inc. funded by ISC, including water treatment plant, school bundle, lagoon project and other infrastructure totalling $52,689,462 in CIP with $27,778,671 recognized as revenue in 2019-20
economic_notes: First Nation has 1/7 ownership in Brokenhead River Casino Resort Limited Partnership (equity method investment, $3,045,321 balance). South Beach Casino contributed $770,000 in revenue. Miishipaawiitik Inc. consolidated and involved in East Side Road Authority contracts. Major capital construction program underway including water treatment plant, community hall, roads, school repairs, Lake Winnipeg School Bundle, and lagoon project totalling $52.7M in construction in progress.
notes: Fiscal year 2020 (ended March 31, 2020). Massive annual surplus of $29.76M driven by recognition of $27.78M in construction-in-progress contribution revenue from ISC-funded capital projects managed by Shawano Consulting Inc. — this is a non-recurring item that distorts normal operations. Total CIP balance is $52.69M deferred to subsequent year. Five entities consolidated including Band Administration, Housing Authority, Education Authority, Lake Winnipeg School Bundle, and Miishipaawiitik Inc. Investment in Brokenhead River Casino Resort LP accounted for by modified equity method (1/7 ownership). Capital lease obligations fully repaid during year ($372,300 in prior year). COVID-19 noted as subsequent event. Claim by Province of Manitoba for $302,989 with First Nation counter-claiming $1,856,547. No remuneration schedule included in provided text. Net debt position of $4,360,418. Construction in progress of $52,689,462 not yet transferred to tangible capital assets.
